jobs.prompt: Create a premium full-body studio product photograph. Preserve the exact doll identity, facial sculpt, eye shape, makeup, hair, skin material, body proportions and construction. Change only pose, camera angle, lighting and background.

Create a premium three-quarter studio product photograph. Preserve the exact doll identity, facial sculpt, eye shape, makeup, hair, skin material, body proportions and construction. Change only pose, camera angle, lighting and background.
